objective: Fix critical bugs (P0), improve architecture (P1), add features (P2), improve DX (P3) across MissionPulse codebase

content: Sprint strategy: P0 (4 items) → P1 (4 items) → P2 (3 items) → P3 (2 items). TDD mode for Core changes, standard for Shell.
reason: Core functions are pure and perfectly suited for TDD. Shell changes need integration tests.

content: Redesigned feed machine with combined search+filter: single loaded state, ActiveFilters context, recomputeFilteredMissions pure function
reason: Previous design had searching/filtered as mutually exclusive sibling states - couldn't search AND filter simultaneously. New design stores filter criteria in context, recomputes filteredMissions from missions + searchQuery + activeFilters as single source of truth.

content: Feed machine tests need updates: (1) SEARCH no longer transitions to 'searching' state - stays in 'loaded', (2) FILTER event replaced by SET_FILTERS with Partial<ActiveFilters> payload, (3) no more 'filtered' state - always 'loaded'. Key tests to update: lines 68, 111-112 in feed.test.ts

reason: Runtime bug: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'toLowerCase') during scan/sync

content: Defense-in-depth strategy: (1) Primary defense in createMission() sanitizing all missions at parser boundary, (2) Secondary defense filtering stack in parsers, (3) Tertiary defense guarding all .toLowerCase() calls in consumers
reason: Multiple layers ensure no single point of failure — even if a parser misses sanitization, consumers won't crash
Bug fixed: 222 tests pass (25 new regression tests), 0 TS errors, defense-in-depth applied across 7 files

content: Enable Hiway connector with confirmed Supabase credentials (URL: jhgjtlkfewuiiofxfrvh.supabase.co, table: freelance_posted_missions)
reason: Supabase credentials confirmed by user — anon key is public-safe (RLS enforced on backend). Added host permission for Supabase API calls.
